name: modelrouter
title: ModelRouter
description: Control your local LLM gateway — health status, preset switching, cost tracking, and key access
author: oyemecarnal

commands.name: status
commands.title: Gateway Status
commands.description: Check gateway health, view active models, start or stop the daemon

commands.name: presets
commands.title: Switch Preset
commands.description: List routing presets and copy endpoint config for any tool

commands.name: cost
commands.title: Cost Dashboard
commands.description: LLM spend by time window and model

preferences.name: gatewayUrl
preferences.title: Gateway URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your ModelRouter gateway

preferences.name: rootPath
preferences.title: ModelRouter Root Path
preferences.description: Path to modelrouter repo (used to start/stop gateway)
